prompt: Erstelle Features für ein Partner-Portal: Co-Delivery-Projekte, Revenue-Share-Modell, Support-Zugang, Industry-Catalog-Zugriff, Pipeline-Matching.

assertions.text: All feature slugs have at most 3 hyphenated segments
No feature description uses outcome verbs (enables, reduces, ensures, hilft, ermöglicht) or describes benefits
Descriptions explain what the feature IS (mechanism), not what it DOES for the partner (benefits)
